name: Prosciutto and Brie Sandwiches with Rosemary Fig Confit
recipeIngredient: 4 ciabatta rolls or a long loaf of French or Italian bread
1/4 pound Brie, cut in thin slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the rolls horizontally using a serrated knife, or cut the loaf diagonally into 4 pieces, then halve each piece horizontally.
2. Spread the cut sides of bread with Rosemary Fig Confit.
3. Make 4 sandwiches by layering prosciutto and Brie on the confit-spaced bread.
